# COMPASSION CREW

COMPASSION CREW is a community-driven social impact organization dedicated to inspiring compassion, learning, and positive action. We bring together students, professionals, and leaders to connect and serve.

## Main Navigation Paths
- Home: https://www.compassioncrew.in/
- About Us: https://www.compassioncrew.in/about
- Our Founder: https://www.compassioncrew.in/founder
- Our Team: https://www.compassioncrew.in/team
- Upcoming Events & Expert Talks: https://www.compassioncrew.in/events
- Volunteer Portal: https://www.compassioncrew.in/volunteer
- Support / Donate: https://www.compassioncrew.in/donate
- Event Registration: https://www.compassioncrew.in/register

## Core Initiatives & Programs
- **Expert Talks & Knowledge Sessions**: Educational sessions led by social leaders and changemakers.
- **Community Engagement Events**: Collaborative discussions and personal growth networking sessions.
- **Volunteer & Service Initiatives**: Active community service drives and skills training.
- **Social Awareness Campaigns**: Education campaigns promoting environmental and social responsibility.
- **Compassion Projects**: Local support networks focusing on youth mentoring, animal welfare, and senior citizen aid.

## Contact Information
- **Email**: compasioncrew@gmail.com
- **Phone**: +91 8884156247
- **Address**: Bangalore, Karnataka, India
- **Tax exemption**: Contributions eligible for 80G tax-deduction receipts.
